mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, class_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from sys_user where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select from sys_user where username = #{username} and deleted = 0 limit 1

select count(1) from sys_user where deleted = 0
and (username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
and id in (select user_id from sys_user_role where role_id = #{roleId} and deleted = 0)
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(username, password, real_name, phone, email, class_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{classId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update sys_user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, class_id = #{classId}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update sys_user set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from sys_user where deleted = 0 and id in
#{id}
